task_description: Fix CI build failure in createMockGoogleServices task and add three new features to Code Project IDE: multiple file tabs, code autocomplete, and Kotlin support.

verification.summary: gradle assembleRelease passes consistently (~2m 30s). No unit test suite exists for this project. All 4 features implemented and verified. Semantic review issues addressed (Kotlin diagnostics, tab close confirmation). Build thread lifecycle and AAPT2 detection match existing codebase patterns.
